clusters.failureShape: An input that collects common personal data (name, email, phone, password) is missing the autocomplete attribute — or has autocomplete="off" — so its purpose isn't programmatically identified and autofill/assistive tools can't help.
clusters.fix: Add the correct autocomplete token to personal-data fields (autocomplete="name" / "email" / "tel" / "current-password" etc.) and don't disable autocomplete on these fields.
